section.heading: Required disclosures for judges and referees

content.p: A judge or referee shall not be entitled to receive any compensation, directly or indirectly, in connection with a boxing match until it provides to the boxing commission responsible for regulating the match in a State a statement of all consideration, including reimbursement for expenses, that will be received from any source for participation in the match.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 14 of Pub. L. 104–272 was renumbered section 22 and is classified to section 6313 of this title.
